hero.title: Built for movement.
hero.subtitle: Premium European activewear engineered for athletes who treat training as a craft.

activities.title: Every move, every day.
activities.description: Activity-specific construction — fabrics, panel maps and finishes tuned to the way you train.

statement.headline: Engineered for movement, designed without compromise.
statement.body: Our patternmakers, fabric mills and finishing partners sit within a 1,000-kilometre radius. Shorter logistics, deeper relationships, better gear.

newsletter.title: Sign up. Stay sharp.
newsletter.description: First access to drops, training journals, and athlete features. We keep our list quiet — two emails a month, no exceptions.
newsletter.emailError: Please enter a valid email address.
newsletter.consent: We process your email address only to deliver this newsletter. Unsubscribe anytime; we never share or sell.

success.pending: Almost there — check your inbox to confirm.

gpsr.title: Product details
gpsr.emptyState: Compliance information is being prepared and will appear here once available.

dashboard.description: Manage your profile, addresses, orders, and privacy preferences from here.

login.title: Sign in
login.description: Welcome back. Enter your email and password to continue.
login.emailError: Please enter a valid email address.

register.title: Create your account
register.description: We'll send a confirmation link to verify your email.
register.emailError: Please enter a valid email address.
register.passwordError: Password must be at least 8 characters.
register.phoneError: Please enter a valid phone number.
register.success: Check your inbox to confirm your email.

verify.title: Verify your email
verify.checkInbox: Check your inbox for a verification link.
verify.successDescription: Your account is verified. You can now use all account features.

request.title: Reset your password
request.description: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link.
request.emailError: Please enter a valid email address.
request.success: If that email is registered, a reset link is on the way.

complete.title: Set a new password
complete.description: Pick a strong password you don't use elsewhere.
complete.passwordError: Password must be at least 8 characters.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Update the details we use for shipping and order updates.
profile.emailReadOnly: Contact support to change your email.

address.title: Addresses
address.description: Saved addresses appear at checkout for one-click selection.
address.empty: You haven't saved any addresses yet.

orders.title: Orders
orders.empty: You haven't placed any orders yet.

gdpr.title: Data & privacy
gdpr.description: Export or delete the personal data we hold for you.

export.title: Export your data
export.description: Download a ZIP of your customer profile, orders, addresses, and consent history.
export.confirmBody: We will compile a ZIP archive of every personal record we hold for you. The download starts immediately and may take up to a minute.
export.rateLimited: You can request another export in a moment. Please wait.
export.failed: We couldn't generate your export. Please try again or contact support.

delete.title: Delete your account
delete.description: Permanently anonymise your data. Past orders are retained per accounting law but stripped of personal identifiers.
delete.confirmBody: This cannot be undone. Your customer profile and addresses will be removed; past orders are anonymised but kept for accounting compliance.
delete.rateLimited: Please wait a moment before retrying.
delete.failed: We couldn't delete your account. Please contact support.

customer.title: Your details
customer.description: We'll use this to send your order confirmation and updates.
customer.emailError: Please enter a valid email address.

shipping.title: Shipping
shipping.description: Where should we send your order?
shipping.methodsEmpty: No shipping methods available for this address.

payment.title: Payment
payment.description: Pick a payment method. You'll complete payment on the provider's secure page.
payment.methodsEmpty: No payment methods available right now.
payment.hostedRedirectNote: You will be redirected to the payment provider to complete your purchase securely.
payment.consentRequired: Please confirm you have read the Terms and Privacy Policy.

confirmation.title: Order confirmed.
confirmation.description: Thank you. We've sent a receipt for order {code}.

consent.label: I have read the <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and the <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy> and agree to both.

withdrawal.title: 14-day right of withdrawal
withdrawal.body: You may cancel this order within 14 days of receiving the goods, no reason required. Read the <link>full withdrawal terms</link> before submitting.

errors.title: Something went wrong
errors.description: We hit an unexpected issue. Please try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

newsletter.INVALID_EMAIL: Please enter a valid email address.
newsletter.UPSTREAM_ERROR: We couldn't sign you up right now. Please try again in a moment.

vendure.UNKNOWN_ERROR: Something went wrong. Please try again.
vendure.NATIVE_AUTH_STRATEGY_ERROR: Authentication is not available right now.
vendure.ORDER_STATE_TRANSITION_ERROR: This order can't be updated right now.
vendure.GUEST_CHECKOUT_ERROR: Guest checkout isn't available for this order.
vendure.ORDER_LIMIT_ERROR: This order has reached its limit.
vendure.INSUFFICIENT_STOCK_ERROR: Not enough stock for the requested quantity.
vendure.COUPON_CODE_LIMIT_ERROR: That coupon code has been used too many times.
vendure.ORDER_MODIFICATION_ERROR: This order can no longer be modified.
vendure.INELIGIBLE_SHIPPING_METHOD_ERROR: That shipping method isn't available for your order.
vendure.NO_ACTIVE_ORDER_ERROR: There's no active order to update.
vendure.INELIGIBLE_PAYMENT_METHOD_ERROR: That payment method isn't available for your order.
vendure.PAYMENT_FAILED_ERROR: Payment failed. Please try again or use another method.
vendure.PAYMENT_DECLINED_ERROR: Payment was declined. Please try another card or method.
vendure.PASSWORD_VALIDATION_ERROR: That password doesn't meet our requirements.
vendure.PASSWORD_ALREADY_SET_ERROR: A password is already set for this account.
vendure.PASSWORD_RESET_TOKEN_INVALID_ERROR: This password reset link isn't valid.
vendure.PASSWORD_RESET_TOKEN_EXPIRED_ERROR: This password reset link has expired.
vendure.NOT_VERIFIED_ERROR: Please verify your email before signing in.
vendure.MOLLIE_PAYMENT_INTENT_ERROR: We couldn't start your payment. Please try again.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has moved.

journal.indexDescription: Training journals, athlete features, and process notes from the workshop.
journal.indexEmpty: No posts yet — check back soon.

studio.disabled: Editorial studio is not configured for this environment.

notice.description: We use cookies and similar technologies for essential site functions and, with your consent, for analytics and marketing.

modal.title: Privacy preferences
modal.description: Choose which optional services may run while you browse. You can change this at any time from the footer.

functional.title: Functional
functional.description: Cart, sign-in, language and consent state. Required for the site to work — these run regardless of your choice.

plausible.title: Plausible analytics
plausible.description: Privacy-first, cookieless aggregate visit counts hosted in the EU. No personal data leaves the EU.

posthog.title: Product analytics (PostHog)
posthog.description: Helps us understand which features are used and where the site falls short. Data stays in the EU region.

sentry.title: Error monitoring (Sentry)
sentry.description: Captures runtime errors so we can fix them. Data stays in the EU region; no order or payment details are sent.

klaviyo.title: Marketing (Klaviyo)
klaviyo.description: Marketing emails and personalised recommendations. Data is processed in the United States under standard contractual clauses.

shell.translationPending: This page is currently shown in English while professional translations are pending.
